programmes.show_name: Martin Clunes' Islands of the Atlantic
programmes.show_description: Martin heads to Madeira, where he takes a lesson in rallying on steep mountain roads that are perfect for the sport, and hears about the fate of Prince Renato II on an old sea fort that was once a tiny island in the main port of Funchal. He then visits the archipelago of the Azores, tasting the unique local dish of cozido das furnas on Sao Miguel, and learning about the history of whaling on Faial before heading out with one of the island's best skippers in search of sperm whales
News, sport and weather from across Scotland

Huw Richards shares practical eco-gardening techniques and Camilla Bassett-Smith visits a breathtaking garden in Yorkshire. Anna Greenland answers a viewer's gardening query and Jason Williams explores a unique indoor community garden in Liverpool
Morning magazine featuring a lively mix of news and current affairs, plus health, entertainment and lifestyle features
A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions
The key headlines from the day so far

Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show, with contestants Jenny Ryan, David Baddiel and Hollie Arnold all trying to say what they see, as they guess well-known phrases for the chance to win a £50,000 jackpot for their chosen charity

Adil Ray hosts the game in which three pairs of contestants use their skills to find words from the fewest letters possible. Trying to Lingo all the way alongside the reigning champions are Brighton couple Louis and Jack and Nipula and her husband Kishor
Stephen Mulhern hosts another exciting edition of the gameshow as one of his brave contestants takes on the infamous Banker and could be in with a chance of a life-changing prize.

Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

Bradley Walsh presents as Evie from Bridghouse, Marco from Manchester, Julie from Bideford and Rob from Stockport pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught
A round-up of the day's news headlines and talking points from the UK and around the world

The boys' driving skills are tested when they experience real-life Tokyo Drift and they meet one of Japan's wackiest record-breakers. The duo go head-to-head trying to crack the most walnuts with their bottoms and Brad makes a bid for redemption by attempting a stomach-churning bungee jump. Barney decides his dad needs to learn how to be more zen
Cain explodes with suppressed rage, Tracy is guilty, and Dawn questions Kim
Theo tries a charm offensive on George and Christina, Kit panics when Mal names his attacker, Betsy and Dylan babysit Connie, and Hope warns Sam against listening to Daniel
A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents
Current affairs show tackling the issues behind the headlines from a Scottish perspective, with studio debate and analysis of major stories

programmes.show_name: Connecting a Killer: True Crime Presents
programmes.show_description: When Special Investigating Officer Steve Wilkins is shocked at a series of unsolved crimes in his hometown, he is given permission to launch a new operation to review all the evidence

programmes.show_name: For the Love of Dogs with Alison Hammond
programmes.show_description: This Morning presenter Alison Hammond carries on the legacy left by the much-loved Paul O'Grady by heading to Battersea Dogs and Cats Home to help the canines find new forever homes. A stray lurcher with a fractured leg captures Alison's heart and she meets an over-friendly golden retriever in desperate need of some social skills. Alison puts a pair of portly jack russells who need to shed a few pounds through boot camp

programmes.show_name: For the Love of Dogs with Alison Hammond
programmes.show_description: An over-excited spaniel puppy is put through his paces to see if he's cut out for life as a military working dog and Alison helps a shy lurcher build up her confidence. A cat gets some much needed TLC after suffering terrible injuries
News, sport and weather from across Scotland

Jeremy is joined by good friend and fellow chef Nisha Katona at Bar Leone, a place where world-class cocktails and appetisers set the tone. Knowing Nisha's love for authentic street food, Jeremy takes her deep into Hong Kong's local food scene for the ultimate clay pot rice, and then ups the ante with a visit to Arcane, a modern European Michelin-starred gem in the heart of the city
